{"id":"beadboard-5kf","title":"Feature: Edit and delete comments in thread drawer","description":"## Requirements (IMMUTABLE)
- Any comment can be edited or deleted (no per-actor restriction)
- Edit: inline textarea replaces comment text; Save commits, Cancel reverts
- Delete: two-step — trash icon → row highlights red with Delete?/Cancel → confirm removes
- Writes go through Dolt SQL (DELETE/UPDATE on comments table); no bd CLI for these ops
- After edit or delete, comment list re-fetches (same pattern as post)
- No new modal components — inline UI only

## Success Criteria
- [ ] Hovering a comment in ThreadView shows pencil + trash icons
- [ ] Edit: clicking pencil replaces text with textarea; Save persists via PATCH API; Cancel reverts
- [ ] Delete: clicking trash shows red confirm row; Confirm calls DELETE API and removes; Cancel reverts
- [ ] PATCH /api/beads/[id]/comments/[commentId] updates text in Dolt
- [ ] DELETE /api/beads/[id]/comments/[commentId] removes row from Dolt
- [ ] Comment list refreshes automatically after edit or delete
- [ ] typecheck + lint + test pass

## Anti-Patterns (FORBIDDEN)
- NO writing to .beads/issues.jsonl directly (integrity: all writes go through Dolt SQL)
- NO confirm modal/dialog component (scope: inline confirmation only, no new modal)
- NO per-actor permission checks (design decision: any comment editable in this tool)
- NO optimistic UI without server confirmation (correctness: re-fetch after every mutation)
- NO new npm packages (existing mysql2 + Dolt client already handles writes)

## Approach
Add deleteCommentViaDolt() and updateCommentViaDolt() to read-interactions.ts using the existing getDoltConnection() pool. Wire two new Next.js route handlers. Update CommentItem in thread-view.tsx with hover-triggered edit/delete controls. ThreadDrawer passes edit/delete callbacks down; after success it re-fetches the comment list.

## Architecture
- src/lib/read-interactions.ts — add deleteCommentViaDolt(), updateCommentViaDolt()
- src/app/api/beads/[id]/comments/[commentId]/route.ts — DELETE + PATCH handlers
- src/components/shared/thread-view.tsx — CommentItem hover state, inline edit, delete confirm row
- src/components/shared/thread-drawer.tsx — pass onEdit/onDelete callbacks, trigger re-fetch

## Design Rationale
### Problem
Comments are currently immutable once posted. Users need to fix typos or remove outdated comments without re-adding new ones.

### Research Findings
**Codebase:**
- src/lib/dolt-client.ts — getDoltConnection(projectRoot) returns pooled mysql2 connection; already used for all reads
